name: Kevin Hart Presents: The Next Level
original_name: Kevin Hart Presents: The Next Level
overview: Kevin Hart takes time out of his busy schedule to introduce the world to some of his favorite up-and-coming comedians, including James Davis, Mario Tory and William “Spank” Horton. Now’s their chance to make it big and break on through to the Next Level.

trailers.title: Kevin Hart Presents: The Next Level - "Spank" Horton - From Heckler to Comic
